title: Africa Map Reference Source Packet
placement: Placed near central Africa as a continent-level source lane; marker text should identify the specific subregion when a product is narrower.
summary: Africa map work needs a dedicated lane because continent-level orientation can hide major subregional differences. Products should separate command-area framing, AU/UN multilateral context, national issuer perspectives, geographic-name questions, and historical/archival maps.

title: Arctic And High North Map Reference Source Packet
